name: context-engine
description: Layered Codex context and memory files, startup/stop hooks, and memory skill for durable cross-session operating context.

interface.shortDescription: Use layered Codex context across sessions.
interface.longDescription: Context Engine provides a layered context and memory convention, SessionStart and Stop hook templates, and a memory skill for managing long-term rules, active work, parked context, archives, task cache, and handoff notes.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Context Engine to maintain layered session context.
